text_body: My family is happy. I have a mom and a dad. I have a little sister too. We play games together every day. We eat yummy food. I love my family very much.

School is a happy place for kids. We go to school to learn many new things. We read books and write words. We also draw pictures in art class. We play games with our friends. Our kind teachers help us learn and grow. School is a wonderful place!
My dog is very cute. His name is Buddy. Buddy loves to play games. We play with a red ball. Buddy has soft, white fur. He wags his tail happily. Buddy is my good friend. I love my dog a lot.
First, get a slice of bread. Put the bread in a toaster. Push the lever down. Wait for the bread to pop up. Take out the warm toast. You can spread jam on it. Now you can eat your yummy toast!

Spring brings green grass and many colorful flowers. Birds sing sweet songs in the trees. Summer days are sunny and very warm. We swim and play outside every day. Fall makes leaves turn red and yellow. Winter comes with cold, white snow. We wear warm clothes and hats. All seasons are fun!

Friends are special people in our lives. We play with our friends every day. We share our toys and games. Friends always make us happy. We talk and laugh together. Good friends help each other. We like our friends very much.

The playground is a happy place. Children run and play there. A girl goes up the slide. She comes down fast. Boys swing very high. They laugh and smile. Friends play games together. Everyone has a good time.
I wake up early. I stretch my arms and legs. Then I go to the bathroom. I brush my teeth well. I wash my face with water. After that, I eat yummy breakfast. I get ready for school. It is a new day!

It was a rainy day. The sky was gray. Raindrops fell on the window. Mia looked outside. She saw big puddles. Mia put on her yellow rain boots. She took her red umbrella. Mia went outside to play. She jumped in the puddles. Splash! Splash! Mia smiled. She loved rainy days.

I have a special toy. It is a small, soft bear. The bear is brown. It has big, friendly eyes. I like to hug my bear. I play with it every day. Sometimes, I tell it secrets. My bear listens quietly. It makes me feel happy. I love my toy bear very much.

Mina loves to help at home. Every morning, she makes her bed. She cleans her toys too. Mina helps her mom in the kitchen. She sets the table for dinner. After dinner, she helps clear the plates. Mina also helps her dad outside. She waters the beautiful flowers. Helping makes Mina feel happy and helpful. Home is a team effort.

Today is our class trip! First, pack your lunch. Next, put on your hat. Meet your friends at school. We will ride a big yellow bus. Please sit nicely on the bus. When we arrive, we will play together. Remember to stay with your teacher. Have a wonderful day!

Lily loves her family very much. She has a kind mom and a strong dad. She also has a little brother, Tom. They play games together every day. Mom reads a fun story to them. Dad cooks yummy food for dinner. Lily helps her mom in the kitchen. Tom helps his dad set the table. They laugh and smile a lot. They are a very happy family.

School is a happy place. I go to school every day. My friends are there. We learn many things. We read fun books. We write new words. Our teacher teaches us. We also play games together. We sing songs. School is a good place to learn and grow. I like my school very much.

I have a pet dog. His name is Buddy. Buddy is a happy brown dog. He has soft fur. Buddy loves to play outside. He runs fast in the grass. He chases his red ball. Buddy wags his tail when I come home. He gives me big licks. I love Buddy very much. He is my best friend.

Do you like fruit? Let's make a fruit salad. First, get some fruit. Wash the fruit well. Cut the fruit into small pieces. Put all the pieces in a big bowl. Mix them gently with a spoon. Now you have a yummy fruit salad! Eat it and be happy.

It was spring. The air was warm. Green leaves grew on trees. Pretty flowers bloomed everywhere. Soon, summer came. The sun was hot and bright. Children played outside a lot. They ate ice cream. Then autumn arrived. Leaves turned red and yellow. The wind blew gently. People wore light jackets. Finally, winter came. Snow fell softly. The ground was white. Everyone stayed warm inside. Each season was special and fun.

Friends are very special people. They like to play games with us. We can share our toys and stories. We laugh and talk together a lot. Friends help us when we are sad. They listen to our ideas and feelings. It is nice to have many good friends. We can learn new things from them every day. Friends make us happy and strong. Playing with friends is so much fun. Remember to be a kind friend too.

Lily went to the park. It was a sunny day. She saw the big playground. First, she ran to the swings. Up and down she went. "Higher!" she shouted. Then, she found the slide. It was long and yellow. Whee! She slid down fast. Her friend Minho was there. They played hide-and-seek. The playground was so much fun. Lily smiled all day.

First, I wake up. I open my eyes. I get out of bed slowly. Then, I stretch my arms and legs. It feels good. Next, I walk to the bathroom. I wash my face with water. I brush my teeth well. My teeth are clean. After that, I eat yummy breakfast. I like fruit. Finally, I get dressed for school. I comb my hair. Now I am ready for a new day!

It was a very rainy morning. Minji looked out the window. Big drops fell down fast. The sky was grey. She could not play outside today. Minji felt a little sad. She found her favorite book. Her soft cat, Nabi, slept on the warm sofa. Minji read her book quietly. The rain stopped later in the afternoon. The sun came out brightly. A big, colorful rainbow was in the sky. It was so pretty! Minji smiled happily. What a beautiful day!

My favorite toy is a brown teddy bear. It is very soft and cuddly. I got it for my birthday last year. My grandma gave it to me. I named him Puddles. Puddles has small, black eyes and a cute nose. He always sleeps next to me in my bed. I tell him my secrets. I hug him when I am sad. Puddles is always there for me. He makes me feel safe and happy. He is my best friend.

Mina loves to help her family every day. She helps her mom in the kitchen. Mina puts the plates on the table for dinner. She helps her dad water the green plants. Mina also cleans her room. She picks up all her colorful toys. Her room looks very neat and tidy now. Mom and Dad always smile. They say, "Thank you, Mina!" Mina feels warm and happy inside. Helping at home makes everyone joyful. It is a good way to show love.

topic: Getting Ready for Our Class Trip
text_body: Our class trip is tomorrow! It will be so much fun. First, please pack a yummy lunch. Do not forget your water bottle. Wear comfortable shoes and clothes. Second, listen to your teacher on the bus. Stay with your group at the park. Do not run too fast. Third, look at all the pretty flowers. Play with your friends. Remember to pick up your trash. Let's have a great time together!
